title: Delinquent MMA

Delinquent MMA, A New Era of Combat Sports Media

Delinquent MMA was created to prove a point. Graduating from college during the pandemic made it extremely challenging to find opportunities in the combat sports world. When applying for jobs on the business side of MMA. Organizations such as Bellator, BT Sports, Sherdog, and a few more all told me I needed experience in the field. How do you expect me to gain experience if you don’t give me a shot?

I said f*ck ’em and created my own experience. Hence, “Delinquent MMA“.
